issue_summary: OfflineSorter had O(N^2) merge cost, and used too many temporary file descriptors, for large sorts
javadoc_before:
/** Merge a list of sorted temporary files (partitions) into an output file.  Note that this closes the
   *  incoming {@link IndexOutput}. */
javadoc_after: /** Merge the most recent {@code maxTempFile} partitions into a new partition. */
